rounds.title: Stuff or leave open
rounds.sourceText: If stuffing: slightly overstuff with Poly-fil, do not close hole, tuck tail into Knocker. If mailing unstuffed: leave hole open and yarn tail outside.

statements.sourceText: If stuffing: slightly overstuff with Poly-fil, do not close hole, tuck tail into Knocker. If mailing unstuffed: leave hole open and yarn tail outside.

conditional.question: Are you stuffing or mailing unstuffed?

statements.sourceText: slightly overstuff with Poly-fil, do not close hole, tuck tail into Knocker
